enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of celebration and joy, emphasizing the excitement of life and relationships.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In the movie Rum, the song plays during a lively party scene, enhancing the festive atmosphere.

Who are the artists involved in this song?

The song features vocals by Anirudh and Simbu, with lyrics by Divine.

When was the song released?

Pori Pathi Vizhum was released on November 3, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pori Pathi Vizhum, the lively beats and engaging lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song captures the essence of youthful exuberance, making it a perfect fit for party scenes in the movie Rum. It conveys a sense of freedom and excitement, encouraging listeners to embrace life's moments. The collaboration between Anirudh and Simbu adds a unique flair, making this track a memorable highlight.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pori Pathi Vizhum is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy. The unique collaboration between Anirudh and Simbu brings an electrifying vibe that is hard to resist. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this track from the movie Rum is sure to get you on your feet!
stanzaMeanings: You took everything with your hands, you stole it all and brought it here.
In this world where everything is calm, you are the one who has caused the chaos.
Is everything today a gift? That world is now in front of you.
You took everything with your hands, you stole it all and brought it here.
The dance now falls, the dance now falls, the dance now falls.
The hunt is now here, hunger is coming, hunger is coming, hunger is coming.
